user_message: Quick one -- prep a brief on Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery. Renewal conversation is tomorrow.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-01 13:05 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 15:38 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery
Date: 2024-03-06
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery), Marcus Williams (Microsoft), Priya (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery)

[00:01:15] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is deployment blockers.

[00:05:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:09:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): The timeline for integration complexity is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:11:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:16:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:21:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:26:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about resource allocation. Can we address those?

[00:28:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:30:00] Priya (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

content.title: Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery - deployment blockers
